Summary: Toyota Motor Corp. (NYSE:TM) has extended the tender period for its bid to privatize Toyota Industries Corp., signaling that the group may need additional time to consolidate shareholder support as opposition from Elliott Investment Management persists.  Investors representing 33% of Toyota Industries have agreed to tender their shares, and when combined with Toyota group's existing 25% stake, the bidder remains roughly 9 percentage points short of the two-thirds majority required to complete the transaction.
